titleStmt.title: SII 22.253: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 253. (A.R. No. 253 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. ACHYUTADĒVA-MAHĀRĀJA—Śaka 1453, Khara (A.D. 1530-31).

summary.p: This records an order of (the chief) Bhōgayadēva-Mahārāja regranting the remission of the jōḍi amounting to 50 poṉ in favour of the temple of Tiruppanaṅgāḍuḍaiyār, for the merit of the king, after obtaining the sanction of Tirumalaidēva Mahārāja. It is stated that this remission of the jōḍi tax had been already granted in the time of Krishṇadēva-Mahārāya, but was being held up by Vīra Narasimharāya-Nāyakkar even after his receipt of orders from (minister) Śāḷuva Timmaya. This fact was now represented by the sthānikas of the temple to Tirumalaidēva, while he was camping at Kāñchīpuram after capturing Vīra-Narasimharāya-Nāyakkar in the course of his campaign against Tiruvaḍi-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmān mahāmaṇḍaleśvara metini misurakhaṇḍa khaṭṭāri
sāḷuva sāḷuva kulatilaka yirājātirāja rājaparameśvara rājamārtā
ṇḍa rājaśekhara tulukkadaḷavipāṭa Oṭyarājya jayastambācārya vannyave
ṭṭai rāya mahārāya pūrvadakṣaṇa paścima Uttara satu samudrātipati śrī
virapratāpa Accutayya devamahārā rājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa sakābdam
1000 4 100 5 10 3- ṉ meṟcellāniṉṟa karasamvatsarattu śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvara tirumalai
devamahārājā tiruvaṭideśattukku viranarasiṅharāya nāyakkarperil taṇṭu poy viratarasiṅharā
yanāyakkaraiyum piṭittukkoṇṭu makara nāyaṟṟil kāñcipurattil Eḻun taruḷivirukkaiyil muṉṉāḷ kirṣṇade
vamahārāyar jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu kāliyūr koṭṭattuk kaḻumala vaḷanāṭṭup piramatecappaṟṟu
tiruppaṉaiṅkāṭu Uṭaiyār tiruppaṉaiṅkāvuṭaiya nayināṟku joṭi cutta mum paṇṇi sāḷuvattim
mayar nirupamum vantapiṟakum viranarasiṅharāya nāyakkar Aṉpatu poṉ joṭi viṭāmal koṇṭu vanta
ceyti yiṉṉayiṉār koyil tāṉattār Aṟikkai paṇṇa pogayadeva mahārājarp parāmaritta
ruḷi tirumalaiya devamahārājāvukku Aṟikkaipaṇṇi Accutayya devamahā rāyaṟku tharmam Āka
Uṭaiyār tiruppaṉaiṅkāvuṭaiya tampirānāṟku taittiruṉāḷum tiruppaṇi yum naṭattukai
kku bhogayadeva mahārājāk kaḻippitta joṭi poṉ 5 10 yintappoṉ Aṉpatukkum yituve
dharmaśāsanam Āka kaṭaivatākavum yinta dharmmattukku yātoruttar A hitam paṇṇakka
ṭaivarkaḷ Allarākavum Inta dharmattukku yātoruttarahhitam paṇṇiṉatu Uṇṭā
nāl keṅkaikkaraiyile kārāmpacuvaik koṉṟa doṣattilum brahmahatti
paṇṇina doṣattilum pokakkaṭaivarkaḷ Ākavum śrīmaheśvara rakṣai
Ippaṭikku bhogayadevamahārājāviṉ Uttārappaṭikkum nirupappaṭikkum kal veṭṭivi
ttamaikku bhogayadevamahārājā Atikāram viṭūṟ kaṇakkappiḷḷai cetirāya Ayyamperumāḷ
Digital edition of SII 22.253 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
